creator: mi@privatelabs.com
text:
Although FreeBSD now supports Ukrainian locale, there is
	no "official" source of koi8-u fonts -- not for the text
	console, nor for X11 windows.

	This ports installs 5 "fixed" fonts in this encoding.

	Note, that the  port of the Gemini family of  fonts -- a
	comprehensive replacement  of the Cronyx  koi8-r (koi8-u
	is a superset of koi8-r) is upcoming next week.

	For  this  reasons,  I'd  like to  propose  a  new  port
	category: ukrainian.
